summary: Phase 2.5 deepening pass for the interpretability + evaluation + alignment cluster (34 keys). Bash curl/wget were sandbox-blocked, so 19 arXiv PDFs were not fetchable; for those keys I retrieved the full verbatim abstract via WebFetch on the arXiv abstract pages and merged that text into the existing excerpt files (replacing partial / paraphrased abstracts where they existed). For the 10 already-local PDFs I ran pdftotext and confirmed all 10 already had §-anchored deep excerpts authored in earlier passes — no changes needed beyond the new files for the 4 missing keys (conmy2023-acdc, heimersheim2024, irving2018-debate, gemma-scope-2024). Net: 4 new excerpt files written from local PDFs, 10 existing excerpts updated with verbatim full-abstract text + corrected provenance, 17 existing excerpts left intact (already deep). All 34 keys now have an excerpt file.

flags: Sandbox blocked all curl/wget invocations to https://arxiv.org and https://aclanthology.org. WebFetch (arXiv abstract pages) was the workaround for arXiv-hosted papers; ACL Anthology PDFs (belinkov2022, hewitt2019) could not be retrieved by either path. Both keys remain abstract-only and are flagged with [PDF-VERIFY] markers in their existing excerpt files for the load-bearing claims.

Local file `sources/papers/burns2023-truth-geometry.pdf` is misnamed: paper is by Marks & Tegmark (key marks-tegmark-2023-truth), not Burns. The local_file path is correct; the misname is preserved in the excerpts metadata. Recommend papers.json local_file lookups note this aliasing, OR rename the file in a future cleanup pass.

10 of 14 already-local-PDF keys (belrose2023-tuned-lens, dunefsky2024-transcoders, gao2024-topk-saes, leask2025-sae-not-canonical, marks-tegmark-2023-truth, meng2022-rome, rajamanoharan2024-jumprelu, wang2022-ioi, zhang2023-apatching, plus the 4 new ones in this pass) had § + eq.-anchored excerpts authored in earlier passes — left intact. The 4 missing-excerpt-file keys (conmy2023-acdc, heimersheim2024, irving2018-debate, gemma-scope-2024) now have full §-anchored excerpt files written from the local PDFs.

All 34 keys now have an excerpt file (32 existing + 2 fixed by writing the missing files for irving2018-debate and gemma-scope-2024; conmy2023-acdc and heimersheim2024 were also missing despite the spec listing them as existing — wrote both new files).

WebFetch markdown-conversion artifacts mean the WebFetch-derived 'verbatim' abstracts contain straight quotes, hyphen variants, and occasional missing italic markup vs. the original arXiv PDF; transcribed forms preserve the WebFetch text directly. PDF retrieval would refine these but not change load-bearing content.
